title: Design Foundations in Adobe Illustrator
description: This course builds on introductory Illustrator skills by focusing on the foundational tools that support structured, scalable design. Learners will explore how to set up their workspace, work with artboards, and organize content using layers. Whether designing on the web or desktop, this course helps learners create clean, flexible artwork with confidence. Through tutorials, readings, and videos, learners will gain practical experience with Illustrator’s interface, tools, and workflows—empowering them to produce professional-quality designs and collaborate effectively across platforms.
